BLAST'S Return-First DEX

Created by enthusiasts for enthusiasts. Thruster is a DEX designed for the top builders, yield hunters, and traders on Blast. We have the support of DeFi founders and leading Blast investors.

Launch App

Discover What You Can Achieve on Thruster

TRADE WITH EASE

Trading on Thruster is straightforward and user-friendly. Thruster delivers the dependable functionality of AMM DEXes you're already familiar with, ensuring a smooth and reliable trading process. In addition, we've integrated a host of user experience (UX) enhancements to elevate your on-chain experience. These improvements are designed to make trading not only more intuitive but also more efficient, allowing you to execute trades with greater ease and confidence. Whether you're a seasoned trader or new to the space, Thruster offers a seamless and enjoyable trading environment that caters to all your needs.

EARN YIELD

Generate yield with Thruster through its extensive suite of liquidity tools and partners, effectively leveraging Blast-native yield. By participating as a liquidity provider (LP), you can benefit from our advanced ALM integrations and innovative native yield mechanisms, which are designed to maximize your returns. Thruster offers a variety of strategies to enhance your earning potential, ensuring that your contributions are rewarded. Additionally, traders on the platform can also earn extra rewards through Thruster Treasure, a unique feature that provides added incentives for active participants. Whether you're providing liquidity or engaging in trading activities, Thruster offers multiple opportunities to boost your earnings and achieve optimal financial growth.

MAXIMIZE YOUR RETURNS

Leverage the diverse liquidity pool types and maximize the potential of Blast-native yield with Thruster. Our Liquidity Pool Tokens (LPTs) are not only fungible but also highly versatile, offering support for a broad spectrum of applications. You can use Thruster LPTs for on-chain leverage, allowing you to amplify your positions and increase your potential returns. Additionally, they can be utilized for collateralization, providing you with more options for securing loans and accessing liquidity. Our platform also supports various yield strategies, enabling you to optimize your earnings through strategic asset allocation and innovative financial tools. Whether you're looking to enhance your trading tactics or explore new financial opportunities, Thruster's LPTs offer the flexibility and functionality to meet your needs.

Unlock the Potential of Thruster Finance

Thruster Finance is revolutionizing the world of decentralized finance (DeFi) with its cutting-edge features and user-centric design. As a highly innovative decentralized exchange (DEX), Thruster Finance empowers users to trade, earn, and maximize their returns seamlessly. Built by a dedicated team of enthusiasts for fellow enthusiasts, Thruster Finance caters to the needs of the best builders, yield seekers, and traders on the Blast network.

One of the standout features of Thruster Finance is its commitment to user experience. Trading on Thruster is straightforward and efficient, thanks to the dependable functionality of automated market maker (AMM) DEXes combined with additional user experience (UX) improvements. This ensures that whether you are a seasoned trader or a newcomer, you will find the platform easy to navigate and use.

Thruster Finance also offers extensive opportunities for earning yield. Through its comprehensive suite of liquidity tools and partnerships, users can leverage Blast-native yield effectively. Liquidity providers (LPs) benefit from advanced automated liquidity management (ALM) integrations and innovative yield mechanisms. These features are designed to maximize returns for LPs, ensuring that their contributions are rewarded optimally. Additionally, traders can earn extra rewards through the unique Thruster Treasure, providing added incentives for active participation.

Moreover, Thruster Finance's Liquidity Pool Tokens (LPTs) are both fungible and versatile, supporting a wide range of applications. Users can utilize LPTs for on-chain leverage, collateralization, and various yield strategies, enhancing their financial flexibility and growth potential. By harnessing the power of diverse liquidity pool types and Blast-native yield, Thruster Finance enables users to unlock new financial opportunities and achieve optimal financial growth.

Security & Audit

Security is a fundamental pillar of Thruster. We understand the paramount importance of safeguarding our users' assets and ensuring the integrity of our platform. To achieve this, Thruster's core contract suite is meticulously designed and built with inspiration from well-established smart contracts that collectively manage billions of dollars in Total Value Locked (TVL). These reference contracts have a proven track record of reliability and security in the decentralized finance space, which is the cornerstone of Thruster Finance.

Our commitment to security does not stop at design. Every upgrade and modification to Thruster's contract suite undergoes a comprehensive auditing process. We engage a team of the industry's top auditors and whitehat hackers, who specialize in identifying and addressing potential vulnerabilities. These experts conduct exhaustive reviews and rigorous testing to ensure that each line of code meets the highest standards of security. This diligence is part of what makes Thruster Finance a trusted name in the DeFi space.

This multi-layered approach to security—combining robust contract design with meticulous auditing—ensures that our platform remains resilient against potential threats. By leveraging the expertise of the best in the field, Thruster provides its users with a secure environment where they can confidently trade, earn, and maximize their returns without worrying about the safety of their assets. Thruster FI users can rest assured that their investments are well-protected.

In addition to these measures, we continuously monitor and assess the security landscape to stay ahead of emerging threats. Our proactive stance on security and our commitment to transparency in our auditing processes underscore our dedication to protecting our users and maintaining their trust in Thruster. Thruster Finance is not just a platform; it's a secure haven for DeFi enthusiasts. With Thruster FI, security and reliability are always at the forefront, ensuring that users have a seamless and safe experience.

To reach new heights we need thrust

In the dynamic world of decentralized finance (DeFi), the need for innovation and robust platforms is paramount. To reach new heights, we need thrust—an impetus that drives growth, security, and user satisfaction. Thruster, a pioneering decentralized exchange (DEX), exemplifies this thrust, propelling the DeFi community forward with its cutting-edge features and user-centric approach.

Thruster Finance stands out in the crowded DeFi landscape by offering a seamless and secure trading experience. Built by enthusiasts for enthusiasts, Thruster Finance is designed to cater to the needs of builders, yield seekers, and traders alike. The platform's core contract suite references established smart contracts with billions of dollars in Total Value Locked (TVL), ensuring reliability and security. This foundation is essential for maintaining user trust and fostering a safe trading environment.

The commitment of Thruster Finance to security is evident in its rigorous auditing processes. Every upgrade and modification undergoes thorough scrutiny by top auditors and whitehat hackers. This meticulous approach ensures that each line of code meets the highest standards of security, protecting users' assets and the integrity of the platform. Thruster FI users can trade with confidence, knowing that their investments are safeguarded.

Thruster FI also excels in offering extensive yield opportunities. Through its suite of liquidity tools and partnerships, users can leverage Blast-native yield effectively. Liquidity providers benefit from advanced automated liquidity management (ALM) integrations and innovative yield mechanisms, maximizing their returns. Thruster FI goes beyond traditional yield farming by providing additional rewards through Thruster Treasure, incentivizing active participation and enhancing user engagement.

Moreover, Thruster's versatility is a key driver of its success. The platform supports a variety of liquidity pool types and Blast-native yield, enabling users to optimize their financial strategies. Thruster FI's Liquidity Pool Tokens (LPTs) are fungible and versatile, supporting on-chain leverage, collateralization, and various yield strategies. This flexibility allows users to explore new financial opportunities and achieve optimal growth.
